title: NOT Too expensive
description: "Too expensive" will never be an issue again with this datapack.
body:
# NOT TOO EXPENSIVE When an item shows "Too expensive", throw it on the ground and his cost repair will return to 30. # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
